meaning: for/to Allah (belongs what is in the heavens and earth)
in (connects السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens' to what comes before)
the heavens (possessed by/connected to something else)
and whatever/what (connects to previous phrase about السَّمٰوٰتِ)
and He (subject of ٱلْعَزِيزُ and ٱلْحَكِيمُ)
The Mighty One (one of Allah's names)
The All-Wise (attribute of Allah, subject of هُوَ/He is)
He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
The one who (used to connect descriptions to nouns)
people/family of (possessed by الكتاب - the Book)
from (showing that أَهْلِ comes from ٱلْكِتٰبِ)
they exit/will exit (referring to the disbelievers from أَخْرَجَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)
that they (refers to those who disbelieved from the People of the Book)
and then he came to them
did not (changes يَحْتَسِبُوا۟ from 'they expect' to 'they did not expect')
their houses (object of يُخْرِبُونَ - they destroy)
and if not for (introduces condition for عَذَّبَهُمْ)
he would surely have punished them
the worldly life (as opposed to ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ - the afterlife)
they opposed (اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ - Allah and His Messenger)
Allah (as the object being opposed in this verse)
what (asking about the things that were cut down)
standing (feminine, describing how the palm trees were left)
its roots (referring to لِّينَةٍ - palm tree)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes after)
the ones who break away from obedience (object of يُخْزِىَ - to disgrace)
he caused to return back (subject: اللَّهُ)
Allah (as the subject of يُسَلِّطُ - gives authority)
upon him (referring to رَسُولِهِ - His messenger)
from (connects خَيْلٍ to the previous statement)
any riding camels (in a possessive or descriptive phrase)
he gives authority (to رُسُلَهُۥ - His messengers)
and Allah (as the subject of يُسَلِّطُ - enables/gives authority)
All-Powerful (describes Allah in 'Allah is All-Powerful over everything')
whatever (emphasizing what أَفَآءَ اللَّهُ - Allah has given as spoils)

Allah (as the subject of أَفَآءَ - granted as spoils)
from (connects أَهْلِ to what came before)
then [it belongs] to Allah (connected to أَفَآءَ)
the close relatives (connected to ذِى meaning 'possessors of')
and the son (possessed by/connected to السَّبِيلِ)
so that/in order to (connects to لَا يَكُونَ - it not be)
a means of circulating (wealth) (object of يَكُونَ - to be)
from you all (referring to the believers being addressed)
the messenger (subject of ءَاتَىٰكُمُ - what he gave you)
so take it! (command to many people)
from it/him (referring to ما نَهَىٰكُمْ - what he forbade you from)
and be cautious/fear! (command to a group)
Allah (as the object being feared in this verse)
Allah (as the object of وَٱتَّقُوا۟ - and fear)
their homes (belonging to those who were driven out)
they seek earnestly (referring to the poor emigrants)
a favor/bounty (object of يَبْتَغُونَ - they seek)
and great pleasure (as something they seek from Allah)
Allah (as the object of يَنصُرُونَ - they support)
those (pointing to a group mentioned before)
before them (referring to those who came before مَنْ هَاجَرَ - those who migrated)
to them (referring to the previous believers mentioned in وَٱلَّذِينَ تَبَوَّءُو)
a need (object of يَجِدُونَ - they find)
and even if (connects to يُؤْثِرُونَ - they prefer others)
and whoever (subject of يُوقَ - is protected from)
he is protected (from شُحَّ نَفْسِهِ - the greed of his soul)
stinginess/greed (object of يُوقَ - is protected from)

and for our brothers (who preceded us in faith)
those who (referring to the believers who came before)
they preceded us (referring to earlier believers in faith)
with the faith (object of سَبَقُونَا - preceded us)
and not (connects to يَقُولُونَ - they say)

you see (after أَلَمْ which makes it negative)
those who (referring to the hypocrites mentioned in نَافَقُوا۟)
with you all (addressing the hypocrites who are speaking to their disbelieving brothers)
forever (describes how long something will not happen)
we will most certainly help you all

if indeed/truly (used for emphasis before أُخْرِجُوا)
not (negates يَخْرُجُونَ - they will go out)
with them (referring to the hypocrites mentioned earlier)
not (negates يَخْرُجُونَ - they will go out)
he will most certainly turn away
then, next, afterwards (shows something happens after something else)
a single instance of fear (object of أَشَدُّ - more intense)
because they (reason for أَشَدُّ رَهْبَةً - more fearful)
they understand deeply (subject of لَّا - they do not)
from (connects قُرًى 'villages' to what comes after)
between them (who don't fight together in يُقٰتِلُونَ)
you think/consider them (referring to the hypocrites mentioned in the ayah)
and their hearts (scattered/divided from each other)
scattered in different directions (with alif maqsura)
that one (pointing to something mentioned before)
because they (are قَوْمٌ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ - a people who do not understand)
they use reason (referring to those who don't fight together)
like the example of (ٱلَّذِينَ - those who)
from (connects قَبْلِ to what comes before it)
before them (connected to مِن meaning 'from before them')
their matter/affair (referring to those who tasted the evil consequence mentioned in the ayah)
a punishment (subject of لَهُمْ - they have)

from you (being disassociated from by بَرِىٓءٌ)
indeed I (subject of أَخَافُ - I fear)
Allah (as the object being feared in إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ)
the worlds (possessed by رَبَّ - Lord of)
so he was (consequence of previous ayah)
both remaining permanently (describes two who are acted upon)
in it (referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)

Allah (as the object of اتَّقُوا - fear/be mindful of)
and you all protect yourselves/be conscious (of Allah)
Allah (as the object being feared in ٱتَّقُوا۟)
Allah (as the object being feared in this ayah)
you all be (negative command with لَا)

their selves/souls (object of نَسُوا۟, they forgot)

if (introducing a hypothetical situation that didn't happen)

in a state of splitting apart (describing جَبَلٍ)

he (referring to Allah in this ayah)

he (subject of the sentence, referring to Allah)
